description: CompositionBrown polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with embroidered logo on left chestFittingComfortWash careLight machine washDo not bleachWarm iron on reverseDo not dry cleanDry flat/reverseDo not scrubBring the preppy look back in vogue with this earthy brown polo neck tee from lee. The minimalist embroidered logo and comfort Fit give a fresh look to this all time classic, while the cotton fabric will keep you dry and comfortable through all seasons. Team this tee with denims, faded jeans or chinos for casual outings with friends or for brunching at the Sports club. Pair it with stylish footwear from the wide collection available at myntra to don that perfect look for brunches at the club or casual outings.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
